title: Y'luubi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Y'luubi''' was a type of aquatic animal indigenous to [[Yuuzhan'tar]] and introduced to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Coruscant's [[Liberation Lake]] was inhabited by these creatures.

In the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], y'luubi meat was considered a delicacy, described as one of the few good things to come from the Yuuzhan Vong. Madame [[Aryn Dro Thul|Aryn Thul]] attempted to impress Jedi Masters [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] with a meal of y'luubi in her restaurant [[Yuza Bre]]. Mara experienced the taste changing from smoky to sweet to tangy in her mouth.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
